question_intent: Find the name of the team that won the most games against the Chicago Blackhawks in the 1990s

plan.question_intent: Find the name of the team that won the most games against the Chicago Blackhawks in the 1990s
plan.detail_query: SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(tv.year) AS games_won FROM teams AS t JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid WHERE tv.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 AND tv.w > tv.l AND tv.oppid = 'CHI' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY games_won DESC LIMIT 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(tv.year) AS games_won

JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid
blocks.notes: Counts the number of games won by each team against the Chicago Blackhawks in the 1990s

blocks.notes: Final scalar block that returns the name of the team with the most wins against the Chicago Blackhawks in the 1990s

FROM teams AS t

JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(tv.year) AS games_won
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid
WHERE (tv.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999) AND (tv.w >= tv.l) AND (tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid)
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT team_name
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, COUNT(tv.year) AS games_won
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON t.tmid = tv.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv_opp ON tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid AND tv.tmid = tv_opp.oppid
WHERE (tv.year BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999) AND (tv.w >= tv.l) AND (tv.oppid = tv_opp.tmid)
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga)
FROM (SELECT t1.year, t1.tmid, t1.name, t1.ga
FROM teams AS t1
JOIN teamvsteam AS t2 ON t1.tmid = t2.tmid
JOIN teams AS t3 ON t2.oppid = t3.tmid
WHERE (t1.confid = 'CC') AND (t3.confid = 'WA') AND (t2.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the name of each team that won at least one game between 1990 and 1999?
